languages.text: {n}Юноша задумчиво кивает.{/n} "Думаю... думаю да. Даже после того, как Гордость Сантиэля погрузилась во тьму, какое-то время мы еще продолжали слышать стоны священных механизмов и бурление заповедного топлива с равнин подле улья".

traits.locale_text: {n}Юноша задумчиво кивает.{/n} "Думаю... думаю да. Даже после того, как Гордость Сантиэля погрузилась во тьму, какое-то время мы еще продолжали слышать стоны священных механизмов и бурление заповедного топлива с равнин подле улья".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: {n}Юноша задумчиво кивает.{/n} "Думаю... думаю да. Даже после того, как Гордость Сантиэля погрузилась во тьму, какое-то время мы еще продолжали слышать стоны священных механизмов и бурление заповедного топлива с равнин подле улья".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: {n}The young man nods thoughtfully.{/n} "I think... I think they are. Even after Santiel's Pride was plunged into darkness, we kept hearing the groans of the blessed mechanisms and the gurgling of cherished fuel from the open plains near the Hive."

languages.text: {n}Der junge Mann nickt nachdenklich.{/n} "Ich glaube... Ich glaube, sie sind es. Selbst nachdem Santiels Stolz in Dunkelheit getaucht war, hörten wir immer wieder das Ächzen der gesegneten Mechanismen und das Glucksen des geschätzten Treibstoffs von den offenen Ebenen in der Nähe des Hive."
languages.original_text: {n}The young man nods thoughtfully.{/n} "I think... I think they are. Even after Santiel's Pride was plunged into darkness, we kept hearing the groans of the blessed mechanisms and the gurgling of cherished fuel from the open plains near the Hive."

languages.text: {n}Le jeune homme hoche la tête d'un air pensif.{/n} "Je pense... Je pense que oui. Même après que la Fierté de Santiel a été plongée dans l'obscurité, nous avons continué à entendre les gémissements des mécanismes bénis et le gargouillis du carburant chéri dans les plaines ouvertes près de la Ruche."
languages.original_text: {n}The young man nods thoughtfully.{/n} "I think... I think they are. Even after Santiel's Pride was plunged into darkness, we kept hearing the groans of the blessed mechanisms and the gurgling of cherished fuel from the open plains near the Hive."

languages.text: {n}年轻人若有所思地点点头。{/n}"我想......我想是的。即使在桑提尔的荣耀陷入黑暗之后，我们仍不断听到蜂巢附近的开阔平原上传来被祝福的机械装置的呻吟声和珍惜燃料的汩汩流淌声。"
languages.original_text: {n}The young man nods thoughtfully.{/n} "I think... I think they are. Even after Santiel's Pride was plunged into darkness, we kept hearing the groans of the blessed mechanisms and the gurgling of cherished fuel from the open plains near the Hive."

languages.text: {n}El joven asiente pensativo.{/n} "Creo... Creo que sí. Incluso después de que la Manada de Santiel quedara sumida en la oscuridad, seguimos oyendo los gemidos de los benditos mecanismos y el gorgoteo del preciado combustible desde las llanuras abiertas cercanas a la Colmena."
languages.original_text: {n}The young man nods thoughtfully.{/n} "I think... I think they are. Even after Santiel's Pride was plunged into darkness, we kept hearing the groans of the blessed mechanisms and the gurgling of cherished fuel from the open plains near the Hive."

languages.text: {n}青年は考え込むように頷く。{/n}"私は...そうだと思います。サンティエルのプライドが闇に落ちた後も、私たちはハイブ近くの平原から、祝福されたメカニズムのうめき声や、大切な燃料のうなり声を聞き続けていた"
languages.original_text: {n}The young man nods thoughtfully.{/n} "I think... I think they are. Even after Santiel's Pride was plunged into darkness, we kept hearing the groans of the blessed mechanisms and the gurgling of cherished fuel from the open plains near the Hive."

languages.text: {n}Genç adam düşünceli bir şekilde başını sallar.{/n} "Sanırım... Sanırım öyle. Santiel'in Gururu karanlığa gömüldükten sonra bile, Kovan'ın yakınındaki açık düzlüklerden kutsanmış mekanizmaların iniltilerini ve aziz yakıtın şırıltısını duymaya devam ettik."
languages.original_text: {n}The young man nods thoughtfully.{/n} "I think... I think they are. Even after Santiel's Pride was plunged into darkness, we kept hearing the groans of the blessed mechanisms and the gurgling of cherished fuel from the open plains near the Hive."
